summary: A stepped pyramid-like structure with a rectangular footprint, featuring a tiered wooden roof, stone and concrete foundation, and a central window opening. The building sits on a concrete platform surrounded by dirt and grass, with symmetrical design across all visible angles.
rebuild_hints: Build rectangular concrete platform base approximately 10x10 blocks
Construct stone brick walls on platform with window opening in center
Layer wooden planks in stepped pyramid pattern, each tier recessed inward
Ensure 4-5 distinct roof tiers with consistent step-back pattern
Add concrete or light-colored block border around foundation platform
Center window should be 2-3 blocks wide with frame detail
Maintain perfect bilateral symmetry on all four sides
uncertainties: Exact block count for each tier due to perspective angle
Precise window dimensions and frame material composition
Whether interior is hollow or filled
Exact concrete/stone brick ratio in base walls
Specific wood type (oak, spruce, etc.) cannot be definitively determined
